top_signals.title: FTSE 100 Live: Stocks fall as US and Iran clash over Strait of Hormuz; UK borrowing costs climb
top_signals.summary: Welcome back to the City AM liveblog. Oil prices are holding steady above $73 per barrel after days of heightened tensions between the US and Iran ahead of peace talks in Qatar. Brent crude – the international benchmark for oil prices – posted its biggest quarterly decline since 2020 for the second quarter of the [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.
